mnemonics.title: CIDR Bits
mnemonics.content: CIDR = Count Important Digits Rapidly (number after slash is mask bits)

mnemonics.title: Private IPs
mnemonics.content: 10 friends, 172 buddies (16-31), 192 pals - private network ranges

visualTips.visualization: Draw mask as 1s (network) and 0s (host) sliding over IP address
Imagine compressed hextets with :: as zip file compression

analogies.analogy: Like dividing apartment building (network) into individual flats (subnets)
Every grain of sand on Earth could have 100 IPv6 addresses
